        SELECT 1
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]

        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]

        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]

        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]

        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]

[t5].[Progress], [t5].[ProjectId], [t5].[Title], [t5].[UpdatedAt], [t5].[UpdatedBy], [t5].[SubmissionLatitude], [t5].[SubmissionLongitude], [t5].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]

    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]

    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]

) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]

    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]

) AS [t5] ON [t].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (

    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [u].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

        SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[ClusterId], [p0].[ConsultantName], [p0].[ContractSum], [p0].[ContractorName], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p0].[Description], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[LastProgressUpdate], [p0].[LastUpdatedById], [p0].[Latitude], [p0].[Longitude], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProjectLeadId], [p0].[RadiusInMeters], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status], [p0].[TenderNumber], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[WardId]
        FROM [Projects] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[WardId] = [t1].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [t1].[ConstituencyId] = [t2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t4] ON [t2].[CountyId] = [t4].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[FirstName], [t].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2]

    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]

) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]

) AS [t4] ON [t].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]

) AS [t3] ON [t].[Id] = [t3].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Wards] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[WardId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ConstituencyId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t1].[CountyId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
    WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t].[ClusterId] = [t3].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AssignedAt], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[RevokedAt], [p0].[Role], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
